change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
1.Education Scholarship Programs

1.1 Provision of all educational materials

1.2 Regular home visits, school visits, interaction with child, parent support and counselling, group guidance and counselling from teachers/principals, monitoring staff. Monitoring of absence, exam results, students behaviour, atttidude, issues.

1.3 School support to raise standard of whole school and minimise gap between sponsored children and other poor children e.g. sports equipment, educational materials, encouragement awards to top, regular and most improved.

2.Community Training and Development Centre

2.1 Daily sewing classes, 6 months for basic and advanced.

3.Residential Child Care Homes

3.1. Education


	Good quality, broad education at local community school
	Extra tuition in key subject areas
	Extra curricular activities and educational tours
	In house library
	Language and cultural exchange


3.2. Physical and Mental Health


	Safe, secure,spacious home
	Family environment with parental support
	Nutritious food, clean water, clothing, medical care
	Counselling/moral guidance
	Freedom to express views, beliefs, personal privacy
	Regular contact with relatives/visits where possible


3.3 Daily Life Skills 


	Housekeeping, health,hygiene
	Personal physical and mental health
	Basic safety (including fire, earthquake)
	Basic eco-farming, sustainability (use of solar, bio gas)


3.4. Vocational Training

3.5. Income generating programs

3.6 Social work/Outreach programs

3.7 Work experience/job training

Where ever possible, and if in the best interest of the child, children are re-integrated from Sunrise home and receive the same educational support as they did when at Sunrise home under the Re-integration Program.

4.Kalika Devi Comnunity School partnership

NGO/INGO partnership with Kalika Devi school;


	Built 14 new classrooms in new school block, employed 15 new teachers for new English curriculum classes Nursery to 10.
	Built 3 new classrooms, new teachers for new Nepali curriculum classes 9 and 10.


5.Community Aid

Emergency medical care

en.full: Project for the development of disadvantaged children and communities in Nepal

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
